title: brunfelsia mutabilis
intro: Brunfelsia mutabilis, also known as the "Lady of the Night" or "Evolvulus," is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Brunfelsia mutabilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
